title: The Traitor Inside Egghead
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Kid, Lucci, Vegapunk as The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.
scene: The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's say we free you guys...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't see you letting us cuff you again later.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well put these restraints back on without a fight.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: See, Rorrow? You keep having to save us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You won't get anywhere like this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lucci! Don't just Blurt it out like that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I take it you won't let Stussy off the hook, given her betrayal?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right. I won't show her any mercy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you trying to convince them not to save us?!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Betrayal through 24 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
